title: Scuro's More XP
description: This mod return 12.000 xp from Ender Dragon and more
body:
This mod targets late-game phase. Killing bosses now may be used for xp farming. First, you can make that dragon drops every time like first(12.000xp) or custom amount of xp. Second, wither and warden also can drop different amount of xp. Just setup in config that amount of xp, that you think is optimal.

# Also check my other mods:

### [Scuro's Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/scuros-furniture)
